search_records.query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.searched_query: site:lastzwiki.com/en Last Z guide heroes research
search_records.search_notes: Kept results to lastzwiki.com only, per domain restriction. Prioritized direct wiki pages for heroes and research over generic entry pages.

results.title: Heroes - Last Z Wiki | Tier List, Stats & Complete Character Guide 2026
results.evidence_summary: Dedicated hero reference page with hero roster, faction filters, levels, and hero equipment listings; useful for hero discovery and cross-checking character data.
results.primary_user_job: Find hero roster and equipment references for Last Z.
claims_to_verify: Hero names, factions, and level examples
Equipment stat lines and hero-specific gear

results.title: Laboratory Badges in Last Z - Complete Research Guide | Last Z Wiki
results.evidence_summary: Research table page covering Laboratory categories and per-level badge costs, including a search interface for specific research names.
results.primary_user_job: Check research categories and badge costs by level.

results.title: Last Z Wiki - Complete English Guide | Strategies, Tier List & Tips 2026
results.evidence_summary: English home hub linking to heroes, research, alliances, buildings, and beginner guidance; useful as a navigation source, not as proof for mechanics.
results.primary_user_job: Navigate to major Last Z wiki sections.
claims_to_verify: Any summary tip claims on the homepage

search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Search kept to lastz.fandom.com only. Results indicate one strong event lead for hero/research mechanics plus two supporting navigation/system pages.

results.title: Full Preparedness | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Daily world event with a Hero Initiative phase that awards points for hero XP, fragments, and prime recruitment tickets; also includes a research-focused Age of Science phase.
results.primary_user_job: Find event cycles tied to hero upgrading and research actions.
claims_to_verify: Event schedule by day and cycle
Exact scoring actions for Hero Initiative
Exact scoring actions for Age of Science
Reward chest contents and ranking payouts

results.title: Heroes | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Core hero overview page listing hero classes and power factors; useful for linking hero-event guidance to hero growth systems.
results.primary_user_job: Map which hero stats and upgrade systems can feed event scoring.
claims_to_verify: Relationship between hero upgrades and event points

results.title: Event Center | Last Z: Survival Shooter Wiki | Fandom
results.evidence_summary: Hub page for regular and special events; useful as a navigation source for event discovery, not mechanics proof.
results.primary_user_job: Locate event categories and entry points for further research.

search_records.search_notes: No matching pages were found on the allowed domain for the supplied query. Search was restricted to www.packsify.com only.
search_records.no_results_reason: No results returned for the domain-limited query.

search_records.search_notes: Search was limited to mmediamreza.com and returned several Last Z-specific guide pages. I prioritized concrete mechanic and event pages over generic or unrelated pages. Some results are partial triage leads and still need cross-validation before any player-facing claim use.

results.title: Shooter Camp Guide - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Guide page for Shooter Camp leveling and troop training, with upgrade data and unlock requirements.
claims_to_verify: Training cap and speed changes by level

results.title: Last Z Laboratory Guide: Tech Research & Lab No. 2 Unlocking - | Last Z: Survival Shooter
results.evidence_summary: Research guide for Laboratory function, tech progression, and the second lab unlock.
results.primary_user_job: Plan research upgrades and lab unlocks

results.title: Zombie Siege Event Guide: HQ Defense & Reinforcement Strategy | Last Z
results.evidence_summary: Event guide focused on alliance defense during Zombie Siege, including duration and fail rules.
results.primary_user_job: Prepare alliance defense strategy for event participation
